programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
programme.desc: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Live: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Kevin Knight defends his TNT title against the cold-hearted handsome devil, Hook; Anna Jay returns to action to challenge Willow Nightingale; the alliance between the Dogs and the Death Riders will be again tested as the factions join forces to battle Top Flight and the Rascalz in a ten-man tag team match; can Jack Perry handle the high-flying Mascara Dorada?

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
programme.desc: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home. Along for the ride is Jia, an orphaned girl who has a unique and powerful bond with the mighty beast. However, they soon find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla as he cuts a swath of destruction across the globe. The initial confrontation between the two titans -- instigated by unseen forces -- is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the planet.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a deadly truck heist arms the killers with enough ammonium nitrate to construct a massive bomb, the team discovers a link to a terrorist group Maggie is working to infiltrate.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A teen shows up at FBI headquarters with a large bag of fentanyl, seeking the team's protection from the men who shot his father; Nina goes to Scola with a proposal he is hesitant to accept.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The abduction of a young woman leads the team back to a cold case from 18 years ago, which pushes Isobel to reconnect with her old partner Jake and take another shot at solving one of her first cases at the bureau.

programme.desc: When a bus explosion kills several innocent people, the team jumps into action to take down the responsible terrorist organization; Scola tries to balance fatherhood with the job.

programme.desc: When a local club owner is found dead, the team works quickly to find the motive behind the murder of a seemingly innocent man; OA is smitten with a new love interest but is concerned that she's mixed up with the wrong crowd.

programme.desc: When a federal judge is gunned down in broad daylight, the team is sent looking for a suspect with ties to a local Islamic center; Maggie reunites with a former colleague.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the director of a Brooklyn migrant center is abducted and held hostage along with his wife, the team must work quickly to meet the demands of their kidnapper; Maggie picks Jessica's brain about motherhood.

programme.desc: After an employee of the U.S. Army is shot in an industrial park, the team works to track down the killer who reveals a larger plot at play; Tiffany continues to struggle with the guilt surrounding Hobbs' death.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are back playing lawyers, trying to convince unsuspecting focus group participants to sign off on ridiculous terms and conditions before they go in. Then they put their family businesses to the test by asking strangers if their radio ad is good to stay on the air. Later, one joker will be getting revenge in an elaborate punishment that the other two are really going to feel.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: Anthony Davis pranks former NFL tight end Marcedes Lewis when a routine valet drop-off turns into joyrides and errands; NBA coach Jason Kidd sends NBA superstar Cooper Flagg into a rookie symposium that devolves into awkwardness and a marital meltdown.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe's former beau arrives, hoping to reconcile; Prue tries to save the auction house from bankruptcy; Piper's use of witchcraft for matchmaking goes awry.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Several banks are robbed, surfacing clues that might help Lilly and the team solve a bank teller's 2000 murder.

programme.desc: Lilly and company use their unique expertise and interrogation skills to solve a killer's demented puzzle and save a young boy's life.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Lilly gets new evidence in the 1973 murder of a young female tennis player who had won her high-profile match against the school's best male player just before her death.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: Members of the crypto-zoological agency Monarch face off against a battery of god-sized monsters, including the mighty Godzilla, who collides with Mothra, Rodan, and his ultimate nemesis, the three-headed King Ghidorah. When these ancient super-species-thought to be mere myths-rise again, they all vie for supremacy, leaving humanity's very existence hanging in the balance.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
programme.desc: Diana Prince lives quietly among mortals in the vibrant, sleek 1980s -- an era of excess driven by the pursuit of having it all. Though she's come into her full powers, she maintains a low profile by curating ancient artifacts, and only performing heroic acts incognito. But soon, Diana will have to muster all of her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah, a villainess who possesses superhuman strength and agility.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Armed with nothing but a hatful of dreams, young chocolatier Willy Wonka manages to change the world, one delectable bite at a time.
